title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Resonance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Resonance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Resonance family as a Curriculum Developer in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Resonance:
Resonance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Resonance!
